notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Dylan Crews singles on a soft ground ball to third baseman Leo Jiménez. CJ Abrams scores. Daylen Lile to 3rd. Dylan Crews to 2nd. Throwing error by third baseman Leo Jiménez.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Dylan Crews singles on a soft ground ball to third baseman Leo Jiménez. CJ Abrams scores. Daylen Lile to 3rd. Dylan Crews to 2nd. Throwing error by third baseman Leo Jiménez.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Dylan Crews singles on a soft ground ball to third baseman Leo Jiménez. CJ Abrams scores. Daylen Lile to 3rd. Dylan Crews to 2nd. Throwing error by third baseman Leo Jiménez.

notableEvents.label: Leo Jiménez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Leo Jiménez grounds into a double play, shortstop CJ Abrams to second baseman Jorbit Vivas to first baseman Luis García Jr. Xavier Edwards out at 2nd. Leo Jiménez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: 3 straight HRs
